security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://poe2scout.com https://poe.ninja https://www.pathofexile.com https://api.pathofexile.com https://repoe-fork.github.io

bundle.longDescription: Path of Crafting 2 is a desktop crafting advisor for Path of Exile 2. It uses a beam-search planner over a strategy library and heuristic rule engine to recommend optimal next actions during a craft, with full re-plan on every state change.
